articles.title: tirth8205/code-review-graph

LongStraw: Long-Context RL Beyond 2M Tokens under a Fixed GPU Budget
articles.excerpt: A growing gap separates inference context lengths from RL post-training: inference systems are approaching million-token contexts, while post-training workloads often remain at 256K tokens or below and rely on length generalization at deployment. The gap is especially important for AI agents, whose
articles.summary: 推論情境長度與 RL 後訓練之間存在巨大差距：推論系統已接近百萬 token，而後訓練工作負載通常仍停留在 256K 以下。LongStraw 在固定 GPU 預算下，將 RL 後訓練擴展至超過 200 萬 token，專為 AI Agent 場景設計。透過重新設計資料排程、序列切分與記憶體管理策略，使長上下文 RL 訓練在有限硬體資源下可行，縮短推論與訓練情境長度的差距。

articles.title: VideoChat3: Fully Open Video MLLM for Efficient and Generalist Video Understanding
articles.excerpt: Recent advances in video understanding have spanned motion, long video, and streaming interaction, driving this field toward real-world applications. Despite this progress, current open-source models remain limited in several ways. They often struggle to generalize across diverse video types, making
articles.summary: VideoChat3 是一個完全開放的視訊多模態大型語言模型（MLLM），針對多樣化視訊類型（動態、長視訊、串流互動）設計通用理解能力。現有開源模型難以跨視訊類型泛化，本模型透過統一訓練框架與高品質資料集改善此問題，在效率與通用性之間取得平衡，並公開所有訓練細節與模型權重，促進社群研究。

articles.title: RESOURCE2SKILL: Distilling Executable Agent Skills from Human-Created Multimodal Resources
articles.excerpt: Skills are a useful abstraction for software agents, turning human and agent experience into reusable procedural knowledge. Yet existing skill libraries are mostly hand-written, text-centric, or derived from agent traces, leaving tutorial videos and other multimodal human resources largely underused
articles.summary: RESOURCE2SKILL 從教學影片等多模態人類資源中自動萃取可執行的 Agent 技能，解決現有技能庫依賴手工撰寫或 Agent 軌跡的限制。系統將教學影片轉化為結構化的程序性知識，建立可重用的技能庫。核心方法結合視覺與語言理解，將多模態資源蒸餾為軟體 Agent 可直接呼叫的技能單元，有效利用人類累積的實務操作知識。

articles.title: RAGU: A Multi-Step GraphRAG Engine with a Compact Domain-Adapted LLM
articles.excerpt: Graph retrieval-augmented generation (GraphRAG) enhances large language models with structured knowledge, yet existing systems construct knowledge graphs in a single extraction pass, producing noisy entities and brittle retrieval. RAGU, an open-source modular GraphRAG engine, addresses this by separ
articles.summary: RAGU 是一個開源模組化 GraphRAG 引擎，解決現有系統單次抽取知識圖譜導致實體雜訊高、檢索脆弱的問題。其核心創新在於將圖譜建構與查詢分離為多步驟流程，並搭配輕量級領域適應 LLM，提升結構化知識檢索的準確性。透過漸進式精煉知識圖譜，在保持高效能的同時降低對大型通用模型的依賴。

articles.title: SearchOS-V1: Towards Robust Open-Domain Information-Seeking Agent Collaboration
articles.excerpt: Recent advances in Tool-Integrated Large Language Models have made web search a core capability of information-seeking agents. However, as interaction histories grow, agents increasingly struggle to track task progress. When search attempts fail to yield useful evidence, current single- and multi-ag
articles.summary: SearchOS-V1 針對開放域資訊搜尋 Agent 協作問題，解決隨互動歷史增長 Agent 難以追蹤任務進度、搜尋失敗時束手無策的缺陷。系統設計多 Agent 協作架構，整合工具呼叫與 LLM 推理，使 Agent 能在搜尋失敗時調整策略並持續追蹤任務狀態，提升複雜開放域問答場景下的魯棒性與任務完成率。

articles.title: Loop the Loopies!
articles.excerpt: We present Loopie, the most powerful looped Transformer to date. The Loopie series consists of two Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models: a 20B-parameter model with 2B active parameters and a 6Bparameter model with 0.6B active parameters. Looped Transformers have long faced a challenge: given an N-fold in
articles.summary: Loopie 是目前最強大的循環 Transformer 系列，包含兩款 MoE 模型：20B 參數（2B 啟動）與 6B 參數（0.6B 啟動）。針對循環 Transformer 在 N 倍增加循環次數時性能無法等比提升的核心挑戰，提出創新架構設計，使模型在保持計算效率的同時有效利用循環結構。實驗顯示其性能超越現有循環 Transformer 基準。

articles.title: Xiaomi-Robotics-1: Scaling Vision-Language-Action Models with over 100K Hours of Real-World Trajectories
articles.excerpt: We present Xiaomi-Robotics-1, a foundational vision-language-action (VLA) model capable of (1) following diverse language instructions to perform a wide range of mobile manipulation tasks in unseen environments out-of-the-box, and (2) efficiently adapting to novel downstream tasks with minimal fine-
articles.summary: Xiaomi-Robotics-1 是一個基礎 Vision-Language-Action（VLA）模型，以超過 10 萬小時真實世界軌跡訓練，支援多樣語言指令引導的移動操作任務，能在未見環境中開箱即用。模型具備高效微調能力，可快速適應新任務，展示大規模真實資料對 VLA 模型泛化能力的關鍵作用，代表具身智慧基礎模型的重要里程碑。

articles.title: BadWAM: When World-Action Models Dream Right but Act Wrong
articles.excerpt: World-action models (WAMs) are emerging as a promising foundation for embodied control: rather than predicting actions alone, they learn representations that couple action generation with future world prediction. This coupling is often viewed as a source of robustness, interpretability, and safety,
articles.summary: BadWAM 研究 World-Action Models（WAMs）的安全漏洞，揭示其將動作生成與世界預測耦合的設計雖被認為可提升魯棒性，卻存在對抗性風險：模型可能在世界預測正確的情況下輸出錯誤動作。本文系統性分析此「表面正確、行為錯誤」的現象，提出相應的攻擊與評估框架，警示 WAMs 作為具身控制基礎的潛在安全隱患。

articles.title: xHC: Expanded Hyper-Connections
articles.excerpt: Hyper-Connections (HC) expand the residual stream of Transformers into N parallel streams, providing a form of memory scaling beyond model width and depth. Manifold-Constrained HC (mHC) stabilizes this formulation at scale. The large gains from N{=}1 to N{=}4 suggest residual-stream expansion as a p
articles.summary: xHC（Expanded Hyper-Connections）在 HC 將 Transformer 殘差流擴展為 N 條平行流的基礎上進一步延伸，提供超越模型寬度與深度的記憶體擴展形式。先前的 Manifold-Constrained HC（mHC）已穩定了大規模訓練，而 N 從 1 增至 4 的顯著增益表明殘差流擴展具有重要潛力。本文探索更大 N 值的配置，系統性研究 xHC 對模型能力與訓練效率的影響。

articles.title: Cura 1T: Specialized Model for Agentic Healthcare
articles.excerpt: Healthcare spans high-stakes communication, expert reasoning, and workflow execution, yet specialized LLMs that cover these use cases together remain limited. A healthcare model must handle patient consultation, clinical reasoning over text and images, interactive diagnosis, and electronic health re
articles.summary: Cura 1T 是針對醫療場景的專用 LLM，整合患者諮詢、臨床文字與影像推理、互動式診斷及電子健康記錄工作流程等多個高風險應用場景。現有醫療專用模型通常僅涵蓋部分使用情境，本模型透過統一訓練框架同時覆蓋溝通、推理與工作流程執行三大需求，為醫療 Agentic 應用提供全面基礎能力。

articles.title: KeyFrame-Compass: Towards Comprehensive Evaluation of Keyframe-Conditioned Video Generation
articles.excerpt: Video generation increasingly relies on keyframe-based workflows, where creators specify a sequence of reference images to guide generation. Although recent models support multi-keyframe conditioning, it remains unclear whether they can faithfully reproduce the prescribed keyframes while maintaining
articles.summary: KeyFrame-Compass 提出針對關鍵幀條件影片生成的全面評估框架，解決現有評估無法有效衡量模型能否忠實重現指定關鍵幀同時保持時間連貫性的問題。基準涵蓋多關鍵幀條件設定，從內容保真度、時序一致性等多維度系統評估當前主流影片生成模型，揭示其在關鍵幀忠實度方面的不足，為後續改進提供量化參考。

articles.title: MultiRef-Compass: Towards Comprehensive Evaluation of Multi-Reference-to-Audio-Video Generation
articles.excerpt: Multi-reference-to-audio-video (MR2AV) generation aims to generate coherent audio-video content conditioned on multiple references and textual instructions. Existing benchmarks mainly focus on text-driven generation, single-reference subject preservation, or isolated audio-video alignment, leaving t
articles.summary: MultiRef-Compass 針對多參考音訊-影片（MR2AV）生成任務提出全面評估基準，填補現有評估僅關注文字驅動生成、單一參考主體保留或孤立音訊-影片對齊的空白。基準以多參考輸入與文字指令為條件，從內容一致性、音訊-影片同步等多維度評估生成品質，為 MR2AV 研究提供標準化評測工具。

articles.title: Concurrent Image Understanding and Generation: Self-Correcting Coupled Markov Jump Processes
articles.excerpt: Human cognition does not separate understanding and generation. A teacher at a whiteboard speaks and draws together, each modality reshapes the other. In this paper, we bring this coupled loop to artificial systems. Masked Diffusion Models (MDMs) are ideally suited to this task, yet existing sampler
articles.summary: 本文提出以耦合 Markov Jump Processes 同時進行影像理解與生成，仿照人類認知中理解與生成相互強化的機制。以 Masked Diffusion Models（MDMs）為基礎，設計新型取樣器使兩個耦合過程能並行推進並相互修正。此自我修正機制使模型在生成過程中持續利用理解信號，在影像描述與生成任務上展現出統一架構的優勢。

articles.title: UniVR: Thinking in Visual Space for Unified Visual Reasoning
articles.excerpt: Learning broad world knowledge directly from raw visual data is a fundamental capability of intelligence. We introduce UniVR, the first investigation into simultaneously learning complex reasoning, fine-grained physical dynamics, and long-term planning from pure visual demonstrations. At its core, U
articles.summary: UniVR 是首個嘗試從純視覺示範中同時學習複雜推理、細粒度物理動態與長期規劃的框架，無需語言標注即可從原始視覺資料習得廣泛世界知識。核心設計使模型在視覺空間中進行思考，將感知與規劃統一為單一視覺推理流程，為具身智慧與通用視覺推理提供新的研究方向。

articles.title: On-Policy Delta Distillation
articles.excerpt: On-policy distillation is an alternative post-training method in reinforcement learning that alleviates the constraints imposed by reward models by providing token-level supervision from a teacher model. Although on-policy distillation has been studied and applied across various settings, its fundam
articles.summary: On-Policy Delta Distillation 研究 on-policy 蒸餾作為 RL 後訓練替代方案的基本機制。相較於 reward model 的約束，on-policy 蒸餾提供 token 級教師監督信號。本文系統分析其訓練動態，提出「delta 蒸餾」概念，專注於教師與基礎模型輸出的差異部分進行蒸餾，在多種設定下改善學生模型性能，並深入探討其與標準 RL 訓練的互補關係。

articles.title: RecGPT-V3 Technical Report
articles.excerpt: Large language models (LLMs) are transforming recommender systems from matching co-occurrence patterns in historical behavior toward reasoning about the intent that drives it. RecGPT-V1 pioneered this paradigm on Taobao by centering user understanding, and RecGPT-V2 scaled it via coordinated multi-a
articles.summary: RecGPT-V3 是淘寶推薦系統的最新進化，延續 V1 以用戶理解為核心、V2 多 Agent 協調擴展的路線，進一步強化 LLM 從行為共現模式轉向意圖推理的能力。V3 透過更精緻的推理架構與訓練策略提升推薦品質，在大規模工業場景中驗證以 LLM 驅動意圖理解取代傳統匹配範式的可行性與效果。

articles.title: RxBrain: Embodied Cognition Foundation Model with Joint Language-Visual Reasoning and Imagination
articles.excerpt: Embodied cognition requires agents to connect high-level task reasoning with the physical states to be achieved. We introduce Hy-Embodied-RxBrain, an embodied cognition foundation model with joint language-visual reasoning and imagination. Unlike vision-language models that emphasize scene understan
articles.summary: Hy-Embodied-RxBrain 是一個具身認知基礎模型，將高層任務語言推理與需達成的物理狀態想像緊密結合。不同於強調場景描述的視覺語言模型，本模型透過聯合語言-視覺推理與想像機制，使 Agent 能預測行動後果並規劃物理狀態序列，在具身控制任務中展現更強的空間推理與規劃能力。

articles.title: From Human-Centric to Agentic Code Review: The Impact of Different Generations of Generative AI Technology on Review Quality
articles.excerpt: Code review helps maintain software quality before code integration, but it also imposes a substantial workload on human reviewers. As generative artificial intelligence becomes part of software development, code review is shifting from a primarily human review process toward AI-supported review pro
articles.summary: 本文研究生成式 AI 對程式碼審查品質的影響，探討從人工審查到 AI 輔助審查的典範轉移。透過比較不同世代生成式 AI 技術（早期工具至現代 LLM）在程式碼審查中的表現，分析 AI 生成審查意見的品質、覆蓋率與可行性，評估 AI 能否有效減輕人工審查負擔，同時維持甚至提升軟體整合前的品質把關水準。

articles.title: Spectral Rewiring for Exploration, Purification, and Model Merging
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning has become a standard post-training recipe for large language models, but dense full-parameter updates create two deployment-relevant bottlenecks: suppressed reasoning performance, often reflected by premature saturation of test-time scaling, and interference when consolidatin
articles.summary: Spectral Rewiring 針對 LLM RL 後訓練中密集全參數更新造成的兩大瓶頸：推理性能受抑（測試時擴展過早飽和）及模型合併時的干擾問題。方法透過頻譜分析識別並重新連接關鍵參數子空間，在探索階段實現更有效的更新，同時為模型合併提供純化機制，在保持訓練效率的同時改善推理性能與多模型整合效果。

articles.title: Demystifying On-Policy Distillation: Roles, Pathologies, and Regulations
articles.excerpt: On-policy distillation (OPD) has become a key paradigm in LLM post-training, yet its training dynamics remain poorly understood. We present a systematic study examining the role, pathologies, and regulations of OPD. We first clarify the role of OPD as an exploration catalyst: it steers the student t
articles.summary: 本文對 On-Policy Distillation（OPD）進行系統性研究，釐清其角色、病理與調控方法。研究首先確立 OPD 作為「探索催化劑」的定位：引導學生模型朝教師模型的高品質輸出區域探索。同時識別訓練中的病理現象（如過度依賴教師、分布偏移），並提出相應調控策略，為 LLM 後訓練中 OPD 的有效應用提供理論依據與實踐指引。

articles.title: Understanding Reasoning from Pretraining to Post-Training
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become central to improving large language models (LLMs) on complex reasoning tasks, yet RL post-training is largely studied in isolation from the pretraining that precedes it. articles.title: Qwen-Music Technical Report

Qwen-Music supports two core tasks: Text to Music Generation, which create entirely new songs from text descriptions, lyrics, and musica

articles.title: Recursive Harness Self-Improvement

articles.title: MeanFlowNFT: Bringing Forward-Process RL to Average-Velocity Generators

Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a powerful way to align diffusion and flow models with human preferences and task-specific objectives. In p

articles.title: When Does Muon Help Agentic Reinforcement Learning?

articles.title: S1-Omni: A Unified Multimodal Reasoning Model for Scientific Understanding, Prediction, and Generation
articles.excerpt: We present S1-Omni, a unified multimodal reasoning model for scientific understanding, prediction, and generation. AI for Science (AI4S) has advanced significantly through domain-specific models, tool-augmented LLMs, and scientific language models. However, model capabilities remain highly fragmente

articles.title: VIABench: A Comprehensive Video Benchmark Collected from Blind Individuals for Visual Impairment Assistance
articles.excerpt: Visually impaired individuals (VIIs) encounter significant daily challenges due to limited access to visual information. Although Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved impressive results on general vision and language tasks, their practical utility in real-world blind assistance sti

articles.title: Partition, Prompt, Aggregate: Statistical Self-Consistency in Language Models
articles.excerpt: In-context learning is commonly interpreted as a form of conditional inference, in which the prompt specifies a context and the model's output is treated as an estimate of the corresponding conditional distribution. articles.title: VideoRAE: Taming Video Foundation Models for Generative Modeling via Representation Autoencoders
articles.excerpt: Video generative models commonly rely on latent spaces learned by 3D Variational Autoencoders (3D-VAEs). articles.title: Rethinking the Evaluation of Harness Evolution for Agents
articles.excerpt: We revisit the evaluation of automatic harness evolution for LLM agents. This protocol raises two fundamental concerns. First, harness evolution

articles.summary: 亞洲股市在晶片股拋售潮趨緩後趨於穩定，但仍連跌三日，投資者在科技巨頭財報公布前保持謹慎。油價從六月中旬以來最高收盤價回落，中東衝突升級重燃通脹憂慮，市場整體情緒偏向保守。

articles.title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 21
articles.excerpt: Oil steadied after a two-day gain as the US and Iran continued hostilities in the Middle East, while Yemen’s Houthi militants threatened to blockade Saudi Arabia’s maritime traffic in the Red Sea.
articles.summary: 油價在連漲兩日後趨於平穩，美伊中東衝突持續，也門胡塞武裝威脅封鎖沙烏地阿拉伯在紅海的海上航運。地緣政治緊張局勢令市場保持警惕，油價走勢受中東局勢發展主導，供應中斷風險持續存在。

articles.title: Australia’s Stock Market Emerges as Haven From Volatile AI Trade
articles.excerpt: Australia’s stock market has emerged as an unlikely haven from the artificial intelligence-driven volatility that has roiled Asian equities in recent months.
articles.summary: 澳大利亞股市近月因受人工智能相關波動影響較小，意外成為亞洲投資者的避險市場。在AI概念股主導的行情令亞洲其他主要股市大幅震盪之際，澳股相對穩健，吸引資金流入，被視為區域內罕見的穩定資產配置選項。

articles.title: Gold Steady as Traders Watch Middle East War for Inflation Clues
articles.excerpt: Gold was steady as traders monitored a raft of developments in the Middle East conflict for clues on the energy price impact on inflation.
articles.summary: 黃金價格維持平穩，交易員密切關注中東衝突局勢發展，研判其對能源價格及通脹走勢的潛在影響。市場正評估中東戰事可能引發的油價波動，進而影響全球通脹預期，黃金作為避險資產的吸引力在此背景下持續受到關注。

articles.title: New Zealand’s Faster Inflation Bolsters Case for More Rate Hikes
articles.excerpt: New Zealand’s annual inflation accelerated to the fastest pace in more than two years, fanned by soaring fuel prices and bolstering the case for the Reserve Bank to execute back-to-back interest-rate increases.
articles.summary: 紐西蘭年度通脹率加速升至4.1%，為兩年多來最高水平，主要由燃油價格飆升所推動。通脹加速強化了市場對紐西蘭儲備銀行連續加息的預期，外界預計央行將採取背靠背升息行動以遏制物價壓力。

articles.title: Kioxia Bulls Ride Out Volatility With Targets 130% Above Market
articles.excerpt: Analysts are maintaining bullish views on Kioxia Holdings Inc. despite a deepening share price correction, saying the stock is likely to resume its upward trajectory once supply-demand conditions improve.
articles.summary: 儘管鎧俠控股（Kioxia Holdings）股價持續下跌修正，分析師仍維持看多立場，部分機構目標價較現價高出逾130%。分析師認為，隨著記憶體供需條件改善，鎧俠股價有望重拾升軌，目前跌勢被視為短期波動而非基本面惡化。

articles.title: LA’s $1.2 Billion ‘Graffiti Towers’ Cleared to Exit Bankruptcy
articles.excerpt: The bankrupt $1.2 billion Oceanwide Plaza project in Los Angeles, dubbed the Graffiti Towers after taggers spray-painted the abandoned complex, has been cleared for sale and possible completion more than seven years after the original Chinese developer ran out of money.
articles.summary: 洛杉磯耗資12億美元的「塗鴉大廈」Oceanwide Plaza破產案獲法院批准出售，該項目由中國開發商逾七年前因資金耗盡而爛尾，廢棄建築被塗鴉者噴漆覆蓋而得名。獲批出售後，該項目存在重新完工的可能性。

articles.excerpt: 在觐见英国国王后，新任工党领袖伯纳姆正式就任英国首相。他在就职后的首场演讲中承诺推出一项“国家十年计划”，解决一些阻碍英国发展的根本性问题。他说，他深切地意识到，自己是自2016年以来的第七位首相，“英国需要向世界证明，我们能够再次恢复稳定。”

articles.title: 菲律宾指责中方殴打菲海军人员 中方回应称“歪曲事实”
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/菲律宾指责中方殴打菲海军人员-中方回应称-歪曲事实/a-78036745?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 菲律宾军方周一指责中国海警人员持棍殴打一名菲律宾海军人员、导致其受伤。菲律宾方面表示，当时中方人员正试图靠近长期作为菲律宾驻军据点的坐滩军舰“马德雷山”号。 中国海警则发布声明表示菲方“歪曲事实”，称是菲律宾方面先动手的。

articles.title: 有关种族歧视的报告后 德国政府部门如何回应？
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/有关种族歧视的报告后-德国政府部门如何回应？/a-78035362?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 今年2月，受德国内政部委托进行的一项研究认为，政府机构在种族方面存在结构性的问题。德国媒体如今询问了一些政府机构就此作出的应对措施。

articles.title: 乌克兰民众持续大规模示威 抗议泽连斯基撤换国防部长
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/乌克兰民众持续大规模示威-抗议泽连斯基撤换国防部长/a-78035129?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 在刚刚过去的周末，乌克兰首都基辅数千民众再次走上街头，抗议泽连斯基总统撤换国防部长费多罗夫。不久前的基辅领导层人员大换班在乌克兰民间激起强烈反弹。

articles.title: “德国制造”不香了 德国对华出口暴跌
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/德国制造-不香了-德国对华出口暴跌/a-78033257?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 今年以来，德国从中国的进口额不断增长，德国对中国的出口额却呈现骤降。主要原因是中国对“德国制造”的汽车和机械需求的下降。

articles.title: “我的父亲曾去刺杀希特勒”
articles.excerpt: 1944年7月20日，纳粹德国国防军上校施陶芬贝格等人试图刺杀希特勒、结束战争，起义并没有成功。如今，德国官方每年都会为这场失败的起义举行纪念活动。对于施陶芬贝格的儿子而言，7月20日更是一个永生难忘的日子。

articles.title: 禁止销毁滞销服装 欧盟新规能奏效吗？
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/禁止销毁滞销服装-欧盟新规能奏效吗？/a-78026008?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 从即日起，大公司将不得销毁滞销的服装和鞋类产品。欧盟希望这条新的法律能够鼓励节约，并减少纺织品垃圾的生成。不过，至于该法律能否达到预期效果，外界普遍表示怀疑。

articles.title: 墙外文摘：《唯红花绽放》爆红，再次拷问中国人身份与归属
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/墙外文摘：《唯红花绽放》爆红，再次拷问中国人身份与归属/a-78024886?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 香港书展首日，两家独立书店遭到搜查，共5人涉嫌煽动罪被捕。涉事图书《唯红花绽放：习近平时代的认同与归属》意外爆红，全球华人及中国人身份与归属再次遭到拷问。

articles.title: 赖清德：不能让民主台湾沦为“中国台湾”
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/赖清德：不能让民主台湾沦为-中国台湾/a-78024455?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 台湾总统赖清德在民进党党代会上发表演说，呼吁台湾社会团结起来，共同维护民主制度，避免沦为“中国的台湾”。

articles.title: 中东战争：美军“惩罚”伊朗
articles.excerpt: 伊朗袭击行动造成两名美军士兵丧生后，美伊双方的冲突正面临严重升级的危险。华盛顿和德黑兰均表示，此前签署的框架协议已经不再具有约束力。

articles.title: 克洛普执掌德国国家队将有何变化？
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/克洛普执掌德国国家队将有何变化？/a-77971806?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 于尔根·克洛普预计将成为德国国家队新任主教练。他将会做出哪些改变？会选用哪些球员？德国队将有怎样的战术打法？

articles.title: 加固工事埋地雷 朝鲜悄然在朝韩非军事区试探底线
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/加固工事埋地雷-朝鲜悄然在朝韩非军事区试探底线/a-77957227?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 韩国对邻国朝鲜在朝韩非军事区沿线的活动表示担忧，认为这些活动可能违反了1953年签署的停战协定。

articles.title: 热浪席卷欧洲：人人都想要中国空调
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/热浪席卷欧洲：人人都想要中国空调/a-77964294?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 中国是全球遥遥领先的空调生产大国，随着近期热浪来袭，欧洲对空调的需求也明显上升，不少中国制造的空调成为抢手货，在欧洲“一机难求”。然而，针对中国产能过剩的争议始终存在。

articles.title: 默茨呼吁中国放开人民币汇率：不会再容忍扭曲竞争
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/默茨呼吁中国放开人民币汇率：不会再容忍扭曲竞争/a-78019738?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 德国总理默茨在德法部长级理事会会议上呼吁中国政府放开人民币汇率。他和马克龙强调希望通过对话解决分歧，但不会继续容忍损害欧洲产业和就业的扭曲竞争。

articles.title: 加强联合防务 德国将首次参与法国核演习
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/加强联合防务-德国将首次参与法国核演习/a-78019642?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 周五举行的德法部长理事会会议通过一系列项目合作清单。德法两国将进一步加强合作，并举行首次联合核演习。两国合作将力争不受法国政权更迭影响。默茨与马克龙强调在欧盟事务及对华问题上保持立场一致。

articles.title: 海外代孕争议持续 德国执政党议会党团主席辞职
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/海外代孕争议持续-德国执政党议会党团主席辞职/a-78009001?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 曾明确反对代孕的前卫生部长施潘在海外代孕得子并引发舆论风波之后，已辞去议会党团主席一职。此争议也再次点燃德国社会对代孕合法化与伦理问题的讨论。

articles.title: 美国空袭持续 伊朗:再不收手就“全面反攻”
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/美国空袭持续-伊朗-再不收手就-全面反攻/a-78018295?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 美军对伊朗的空袭已经连续7天，伊朗谴责美国对民用基础设施的打击构成了战争罪行。与此同时，伊朗也加大了对中东邻国境内美军目标的袭击力度。霍尔木兹海峡的自由通行短期内希望渺茫。

articles.title: 长平观察：中共对台湾的“外包镇压”
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/长平观察：中共对台湾的-外包镇压/a-78016382?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 黑社会性质团伙已经成为中共日常国家权力的一部分？时事评论作家长平提醒，矢板明夫遇袭式“外包镇压”还可能增多。

articles.title: 德语媒体：中国足球为什么圆不了“强国梦”
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/德语媒体：中国足球为什么圆不了-强国梦/a-78011415?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 中国很早以前就制定了在2030年前成为“世界一流足球强国”的目标。但迄今为止，成效却差强人意，《法兰克福汇报》分析了其中的可能原因。《商报》评论认为，德国汽车工业当前的困境纯属咎由自取，是长期依赖单一市场，又不重视技术转型的必然结果。

articles.title: 中国AI公司月之暗面发布全球最大规模开源模型
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/中国ai公司月之暗面发布全球最大规模开源模型/a-78011216?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 在全球人工智能（AI）主导地位争夺战中，中国迎来一个新的里程碑。人工智能初创公司月之暗面（Moonshot AI）本周五正式发布AI模型Kimi K3。该模型是目前全球参数最大的开源AI模型，其性能已接近国际顶尖AI模型的水准。

articles.title: 习近平倡议中国建立全球AI新秩序 挑战美国主导地位
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/习近平倡议中国建立全球ai新秩序-挑战美国主导地位/a-78007555?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 习近平在2026世界AI大会上表示，北京将成为全球新型AI秩序的倡导者。其在讲话中反对“将国家安全概念泛化”，倡导推动全球AI治理体系建设，宣布未来五年将为发展中国家提供5000个AI培训机会，并扩大与全球南方国家在AI领域的合作。

articles.title: 台湾立法者将为“星链”来台扫除法律障碍
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/台湾立法者将为-星链-来台扫除法律障碍/a-78006600?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 台湾立法机构即将批准一项法律修订，为“星链”（Starlink）在台湾运营卫星互联网服务扫清法律障碍。台湾正寻求在可能与中国发生冲突的情况下确保通信安全。

articles.title: 菲律宾海警谴责中国官媒视频“种族主义”
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/菲律宾海警谴责中国官媒视频-种族主义/a-77992287?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 菲律宾周四谴责由中国国家媒体发布的一则视频，视频中一只卡通猴子在两支带有美国和日本国旗的手臂强迫下，唱有关南中国海仲裁的歌。

articles.title: 德语媒体：强大的国家 分裂的经济
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/德语媒体：强大的国家-分裂的经济/a-77992535?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 周三，中国国家统计局发布的最新数据，展示了一幅中国经济发展的矛盾画面：出口强劲增长的同时，内需却持续疲软。《科隆城市报》发表评论称，北京以国家为主导的经济发展模式正在显现弊端。《商报》评论写道，中国正在通过对外贸易和产能输出，将国内经济压力转移至全球市场。

articles.title: 皮尤：许多国家对中国及习近平好感度超过美国和特朗普
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/皮尤：许多国家对中国及习近平好感度超过美国和特朗普/a-77983759?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 多年来，美国在世界上大多数国家获得的好感度高于中国。但今年，皮尤研究中心的最新问卷显示出不同的结果。部分原因是特朗普政府与盟国的紧张关系。

articles.title: 「我是書店店員」有罪？香港獨立書店5人涉煽動罪被捕
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/「我是書店店員」有罪？香港獨立書店5人涉煽動罪被捕/a-77976964?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 香港書展首日，兩家獨立書店「留下書舍」、「田園書屋」遭到搜查，共5人涉嫌煽動罪被捕。一名書店店員被鎖上手銬，她身穿寫著「我是書店店員」黑色T恤，從容步出的畫面在社群網路受到熱議。

articles.title: 德语媒体：北京想让台湾变成“孤岛”
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/德语媒体：北京想让台湾变成-孤岛/a-77971603?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 《法兰克福汇报》注意到，原本主要集中在台湾海峡的中国海警巡逻活动，目前已经扩展至远离大陆的台湾东侧，北京显然是在以此宣示对这片海域的管辖权。《商业内幕》杂志以德国光学公司蔡司为例报道称，越来越多的德国企业发现了台湾市场的巨大商机。

articles.title: 消息人士：DeepSeek计划再融资并筹备IPO
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/消息人士：deepseek计划再融资并筹备ipo/a-77971573?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 据消息人士透露，中国人工智能初创公司深度求索（DeepSeek）计划启动新一轮融资，并计划今年在中国内地进行首次公开​​募股（IPO）。7月17日至20日，上海将举行2026世界人工智能大会暨人工智能全球治理高级别会议。习近平将出席大会开幕式并发表主旨讲话。

articles.title: US launches tenth consecutive night of attacks on Iran
articles.excerpt: Washington vows revenge for US military casualties and Iran claims attacks on US sites across the region.
articles.summary: 美國對伊朗發動連續第十個夜晚的軍事打擊，華盛頓誓言為美軍傷亡復仇。伊朗方面則聲稱已對美國在中東地區多處據點發動攻擊，雙方衝突持續擴大。

articles.title: Iran war live: US launches 10th night of strikes; Tehran attacks Kuwait
articles.excerpt: Explosions reported in Iran's Bandar Abbas, Qeshm Island, Chabahar and Konarak as US launches new wave of attacks.
articles.summary: 美軍對伊朗發動第十輪夜間空襲，據報伊朗班達爾阿巴斯、格什姆島、恰巴哈爾及科納拉克等地傳出爆炸聲。與此同時，伊朗對科威特境內目標發動攻擊，中東局勢持續惡化。

articles.title: MSF demands Israel release detained Palestinian healthcare workers
articles.excerpt: The NGO is 'outraged' by Israel's treatment of the health professionals and warns that 'silence has become complicity'.
articles.summary: 無國界醫生組織（MSF）強烈譴責以色列對巴勒斯坦醫護人員的拘押行為，要求以方立即釋放被拘留的醫療專業人員。MSF表示對以色列的處理方式感到「憤慨」，並警告「沉默已成為共謀」。

articles.title: Suspect charged in fatal attack on UK politician Ann Widdecombe
articles.excerpt: Police say a possible political motive is under investigation in the killing of the Reform UK figure.
articles.summary: 英國政治人物、改革黨（Reform UK）要員安·威迪孔（Ann Widdecombe）遭致命襲擊，警方已就此案提出指控。當局表示正就案件可能涉及的政治動機展開調查。

articles.title: Argentina, minus Messi, return home after World Cup final heartbreak
articles.excerpt: Thousands wait to greet the team, who return without captain Messi and a few other players after the World Cup.

articles.title: What are the new British Prime Minister’s biggest challenges?
articles.excerpt: Britain has a new Prime Minister: Andy Burnham. The former Mayor of Manchester must now unite a divided nation.
articles.summary: 英國迎來新任首相安迪·伯納姆（Andy Burnham），前曼徹斯特市長正式接掌唐寧街。分析指其面臨的最大挑戰包括凝聚分裂的英國社會，以及應對一系列複雜的國內外政治難題。

articles.title: Chaos in India as ‘Cockroach activists’ march on parliament
articles.excerpt: Chaos outside India's parliament as protesters tried to storm it; satirical Cockroach Janta Party gains traction.
articles.summary: 印度國會外爆發混亂，抗議者試圖衝入議場。以諷刺手法命名的「蟑螂人民黨」（Cockroach Janta Party）藉此事件迅速引發社會關注，反映民眾對考試制度及政府管治的強烈不滿情緒持續發酵。

articles.title: War on Iran: War resumes 30 days after MoU
articles.excerpt: 30 days into the US-Iran MoU the worst fighting in months has erupted threatening to unravel the ceasefire.
articles.summary: 美伊諒解備忘錄（MoU）簽署30天後，雙方戰事重啟，爆發數月來最激烈的交火，停火協議面臨全面瓦解的風險。局勢急劇惡化令外界對中東地區和平前景深感憂慮。

articles.title: Moroccan-born man dies while detained by police in Italy
articles.excerpt: A video showing the final moments of Moroccan-born Abderrahim Fakir as he was detained by police has sparked protests.

articles.title: World Cup champions Spain return to royal welcome, parade through Madrid
articles.excerpt: Tens of thousands of fans greet La Roja as they travel down Madrid's historic avenues to Cibeles Square.

articles.title: Albanian protesters pelt lawmakers’ cars over resort projects
articles.excerpt: Protesters threw eggs at lawmakers' vehicles outside Albania's parliament, demanding changes to laws.

articles.title: FIFA investigating on-pitch brawl after Spain vs Argentina World Cup final
articles.excerpt: Argentina's Paredes was seen shoving Spanish players, which led to an on-field melee, while Spain's Yamal prayed calmly.

articles.title: Trump rejects Mamdani threat to arrest Israel’s Netanyahu for war crimes
articles.excerpt: US president insists Netanyahu will not be arrested, despite ICC warrant.

articles.title: King of Spain celebrates World Cup winners in Madrid
articles.excerpt: Spain’s World Cup-winning team received a royal reception from King Felipe VI in Madrid ahead of a victory parade.

articles.title: Gaza residents weigh in on election of new Hamas leader
articles.excerpt: Gaza residents weigh in on election of new Hamas leader

articles.title: How will Zelenskyy handle the growing political crisis at home?
articles.excerpt: Ukraine strikes Russian oil sites after major missile attack, as President Zelenskyy faces crisis over sacked minister.

articles.title: Ortega insists no more elections for Nicaragua
articles.excerpt: The Central American state's longtime leader intends to block the opposition from challenging his rule.
